title: Project: Summons
description: Useful companions for fighting AND adventuring! New and unique systems for creating your story!
body:
This mod is loosely based on the "Innocent Devil" concept from Castlevania: Curse of Darkness. 

There are six Innocent Devil types in the original game, but for the sake of time I only focused on the first three: the Fairy, Battle, and Bird types. Their core functions are identical to the videogame with the fairy healing and the bird and battle summons defending the player, but I plan to add more uses (similar to the game) in the future, between working on other mods.
